content.rendered:
Nonprofit Tech for Good and the services we offer to the nonprofit community would not be possible without the support of our sponsors.

Neon One

Neon One is a platform that helps small and mid-size nonprofits inspire generosity by providing affordable, well-designed fundraising and communication tools, including payment processing, email and text marketing, and membership management.

CharityEngine

CharityEngine is an all-in-one CRM & fundraising platform that helps nonprofits raise more by providing core technology—ranging from auctions to peer-to-peer fundraising tools—that do not require integrations, syncing, or uploads. 

Blackbaud

Blackbaud provides essential CRM and fundraising technology for nonprofits, foundations, and educational institutions, with $100 billion donated, granted, and invested through its platforms every year.

Eventgroove

Eventgroove is a one-stop platform for virtual, hybrid, and in-person events that offers event management, online fundraising, ticketing, and online storefronts for print and digital merchandise.

Click & Pledge

Click & Pledge is an all-in-one fundraising platform that offers innovative tools, such as customizable donation forms, Zoom® giving, and a complete Salesforce integration, which have been used by 20,000+ organizations worldwide since 2000.

GolfStatus

GolfStatus is an event management platform for golf fundraisers. Nonprofits can set up event websites in minutes that offer online registration and payment processing, live leaderboards, and sponsorship packages.

Mobile Commons

Mobile Commons is a mobile messaging platform for nonprofits that offers a suite of SMS and MMS messaging services designed to engage and inspire donors and supporters.

GalaBid

GalaBid is a fundraising platform that offers a range of unique fundraising options for nonprofits, including silent auctions, raffles, donation drives, event ticketing, and crowdfunding.

Civic Shout

Civic Shout is a digital platform that enables progressive nonprofits to easily grow their email and SMS supporter lists by running affordable and targeted advocacy petitions.
